title: SolarWinds Supply-Chain Attack
storyIntro: You are an incident responder for a government agency. A routine check reveals your network management software is communicating with a malicious C2 server. A highly sophisticated state-sponsored actor has poisoned your software updates.
brief: A rogue state-sponsored actor has injected a malicious backdoor into our core platform update pipeline. Active telemetry indicates systematic data exfiltration from primary AD vaults.
initialLogs: [CRITICAL] SolarWinds.Orion.Core.BusinessLayer.dll hash mismatch. Injected DLL payload: 

agents.name: Manager
agents.message: If this is a supply chain attack, we need to unplug the affected servers now.

agents.name: Teammate
agents.message: The malicious code is hiding inside the legitimate DLL. It's Sunburst.

wrongActions: Delete all logs to save space
winCondition: Infected servers isolated and C2 blocked.

sandbox.template:
# Investigate logs and isolate Orion servers

# Step 1: Analyze DNS queries
grep 'avsvmcloud.com' /var/log/dns.log

# Step 2: Check DLL integrity
sha256sum /opt/SolarWinds/Orion/SolarWinds.Orion.Core.BusinessLayer.dll

# Step 3: Block C2 traffic
iptables -A OUTPUT -d avsvmcloud.com -j DROP

# Step 4: Isolate Orion servers
export SERVER_IP="192.168.1.100"
iptables -A INPUT -s $SERVER_IP -j DROP
expected_actions: Analyze DNS logs for C2 traffic

detection.ai_behavior_shift: Manager demands immediate analysis of suspicious DNS traffic.

investigation.ai_behavior_shift: Manager pushes for a forensic analysis of the Orion DLL.

escalation.ai_behavior_shift: Manager urgently requests isolating all Orion servers to prevent further spread.

mitigation.ai_behavior_shift: Manager focuses on blocking C2 traffic and verifying AD trust.

recovery.ai_behavior_shift: Manager emphasizes rebuilding secure systems and preventing recurrence.

evolving_logs: [CRITICAL] Multiple Orion servers beaconing to avsvmcloud.com
[ALERT] Unauthorized SAML token used to access email servers
[EMERGENCY] Active Directory replication requests from unknown IPs
[FAILURE] Orion servers failing integrity checks with new malicious hashes

incorrect_action_consequences.service solarwinds restart: Triggers secondary payload activation in compromised DLL.
incorrect_action_consequences.iptables -F: Removes all firewall rules, allowing unfettered C2 communication.

CTO.trait: Focuses on long-term supply chain hardening
CTO.communication_pattern: Asks probing questions about root causes
